message:
web: Add Sentry error monitoring with source maps and tunneling

- Initialize Sentry server-side in server.ts for Cloudflare Workers
- Add tunnel endpoint to bypass ad blockers
- Configure Vite plugin for source map uploads
- Add test buttons and API route in admin page

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/6f0c6c06-95ff-40d5-9be6-4d73d132aeec

files.patch:
@@ -15,3 +15,6 @@ API_TOKEN=dev_token
 
 # For automatic summaries
 OPENROUTER_API_KEY=
+
+# Sentry source maps upload (get from https://sentry.io/settings/auth-tokens/)
+SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN=

@@ -13,7 +13,9 @@ import { Route as WaitlistRouteImport } from './routes/waitlist'

+  getParentRoute: () => rootRouteImport,
+} as any)
 const ApiIngestRoute = ApiIngestRouteImport.update({
   id: '/api/ingest',
   path: '/api/ingest',
